releases.label: Roadmap
releases.summary: What we're building now and what comes next.

items.title: Dev Mode
items.description: Development mode tooling, debugging, and hot-reload capabilities for rapid agent iteration.

items.title: Cloud Integration
items.description: Connect desktop app to cloud orchestrator for 24/7 agent execution with WebSocket streaming.

items.title: Web App
items.description: Marketing site, auth portal, subscription management, and cloud dashboard.

items.title: Internationalization
items.description: Multi-language support with locale management, RTL layouts, and community translations.

items.title: Distribution & Polish
items.description: Production-ready installers, auto-updates, code signing, and final QA across all platforms.

items.title: Team (Group Projects)
items.description: Shared workspaces, collaborative agent development, role-based access, and team dashboards.

releases.label: Alpha 2
releases.summary: A2A gateway foundation, release log infrastructure.

items.title: A2A Gateway foundation
items.description: Authentication, gateway exposure flag, agent-card discovery, and JSON-RPC entry point for external A2A clients. Adds external_api_keys table, Bearer token middleware on the management HTTP API, gateway_exposure column on personas, GET /agent-card/{persona_id}, and POST /a2a/{persona_id}.

items.title: Per-process system API key bootstrap
items.description: Process-scoped 'system' API key minted on every app start; rotated on restart, exposed to the desktop frontend via get_system_api_key for direct HTTP calls into the management API.

items.title: Release log (What's New)
items.description: In-app release navigation with a top-bar tab list, active release as default view, and the legacy roadmap as a special tab. Config lives in src/data/releases.json so /research can append accepted findings.

items.title: Initial alpha release
items.description: First tagged build with the desktop app, persona engine, and core management APIs.
